'''Reiber Manufacturing''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jeyell/Legends|Jeyell]]. They also produced [[Black market/Legends|black market]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] matrixes and mission specific components. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Reiber Manufacturing was nationalized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="GNN6" /> Along with [[Bansche Tech/Legends|Bansche Tech]], [[SGI Systems, Inc.]], and [[Sencil Corporation]], Reiber Manufacturing was reformed into the [[Imperial Droid Corporation]].<ref name="PP" />
